title: T-016 — API: BOM Generator batch endpoint (POST /api/technical/bom-generator)
prompt: Implement POST /api/technical/bom-generator per §7.3. Body: { scope: 'all_complete'|'selected_fgs', fg_codes?: string[], output_mode: 'per_fg'|'single_batch' }. Enqueue async outbox job: select target FGs (V-TEC-15 = Status_Overall='Complete' from 01-NPD), collect items + active BOM lines + co_products. Worker writes XLSX (ExcelJS) to S3/Blob (use existing storage adapter). Return { job_id, expected_count }. Permission technical.bom.generate_batch. RED tests/api/bom-generator.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/bom-generator.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM Generator endpoint enqueuing async XLSX job, V-TEC-15 enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use existing outbox pattern (00-FOUNDATION §10). Worker generates BOM_FG<code>.xlsx per FG when output_mode='per_fg', or BOM_Batch_<date>.xlsx with N sheets when 'single_batch'. Audit row action='bom_batch_generate'. Skip FGs not in Status_Overall='Complete'.
acceptance_criteria: Given 3 FGs of which 2 are Status_Overall='Complete', when POST scope='all_complete', then expected_count=2 and only 2 are queued.
Given output_mode='per_fg' with 2 FGs, when worker runs, then 2 distinct XLSX URLs are produced.
Given user without technical.bom.generate_batch, when POST runs, then 403.
Given POST runs, when audit_log queried, then action='bom_batch_generate' row exists.
test_strategy: RED tests for V-TEC-15 filter + RBAC + output mode.
risk_red_lines: Do not generate XLSX synchronously inside the request (must be outbox-async).
Do not include private_jsonb in XLSX output.
